title: What Is NAD+? The Molecule Behind Your Energy and Aging (Explained Simply)
seo_title: What Is NAD+? Energy, Aging & Your Cells Explained
meta_description: What is NAD+? Learn why this key molecule declines after 40, how it affects your energy and brain, and what science says about restoring it naturally.
tags: NAD+, energy, aging, longevity, cellular health, women over 40, supplements
author: Happy Aging Team
excerpt: NAD+ is the molecule your cells use to make energy and repair DNA, and it drops by half between your 20s and 50s. Here is what that means for your energy, brain, and skin, and what you can do about it.
